ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locality where the specimen was collected */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the museum housing the specimen */,
  "specimen_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the specimen */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study related to the specimen */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the specimen */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material type (e.g., extant, fossil) */,
  "preservation_method" TEXT /* Method used for preserving the specimen */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the specimen */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the specimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_locality_id FOREIGN KEY ("locality_id") REFERENCES localities ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "museums" (
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each museum */,
  "museum_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the museum */,
  "museum_name" TEXT /* Full name of the museum */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the museum */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "curator_name" TEXT /* Name of the curator */,
  "curator_email" TEXT /* Email of the curator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_reference" TEXT /* Reference or title of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locality */,
  "locality_name" TEXT /* Name of the locality */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the locality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the locality */,
  "biome" TEXT /* Biome of the locality */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Name of the material type (e.g., extant, fossil) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "preservation_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for preserving the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_history_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specimen */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being collaborated on */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_tags_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication appeared */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample collection */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen associated with the collection */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collector" TEXT /* Name of the collector */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the sample */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collections_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, diagram) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_images_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen associated with the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., observation, experiment) */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_videos_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_audio" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio recording */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen associated with the audio */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL of the audio */,
  "audio_type" TEXT /* Type of audio (e.g., vocalization, instrumentation) */,
  "audio_description" TEXT /* Description of the audio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_audio_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)
